Interface IImageFeaturePoints

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to the properties of a list of image feature points.

[Guid("3FD7CB64-F18F-4380-B128-135206147E75")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IImageFeaturePoints

Properties

CellSize

The cell size at which feature points are extracted.

IPnt CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPnt

Examples

Sample Snippet

Count

The image feature point count.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Element[int]

The image feature point at the specified position.

IImageFeaturePoint Element[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

IImageFeaturePoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The extent within which feature points are extracted.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

ImageID

The feature points' image ID.

int ImageID { get; set; }

Property Value

int
